verses.text: Mi a tul tampite hong kikhawmin khatlekhat a kisikkha gawp dongin kinehcipin a om laitakin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah thu gen masa a, “Farisi mite' kineihkhemna ahi, a silngo uh limtakin kidawm un
A kiseelte khatvei teitei kimu ding a, thusimte khatvei teitei thulang suak ding hi
Zan khuamial sunga na gente uh sun khuavak sungah kigenkik ding a, innsung tawngah na kihuau simnate uh mi khempeuh in theithang ding uh hi.
“Lawmte aw, note kiangah kong genin-ah, pumpi a thahkhit ciangin a siazaw a hihthei nawnlote na kihta kei un
Kuate kihta ding na hi uh hiam cih leh, mite in a thah khitsa mipa pen hell khuk sungah a khiathuah theilai Pasian na kihta un
Gitta nga ciangin hamu-in kizuak lel hilo ahi hiam? Tua bang hi lel napi-in Pasian in gitta khat beek mangngilhlo hi
Na lutung uha om na sammal zah ciat nangawn uh Pasian in thei khin hi. Note lunghimawh kei un. Gitta tampi sangin na manphazaw ciat uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Khrih Mi Hi'ng, ci-in Mi' Theihin Genna

verses.text: “Note kiangah kong cihin-ah, keima mi ahihna mi' theihin a genkhiate, Mihing Tapa in zong Pasian' vantung mite' mai-ah, keima mi hi, ci-in genkhia ding a
ahi zongin keima mi ahihna mi' theihin a genkhia nuamlote, Pasian' vantung mite mai-ah zong keima mi hi, ci-in Mihing Tapa in genkhia nuamlo ding hi
Mihing Tapa a langpangte a mawhna uh kimaisak thei ding a, Kha Siangtho a langpangte a mawhna uh kimaisaklo ding hi
Thusitna a thuak dingin kikhopna inn-ah ahi a, hausa zumah ahi zongin hong paipih uh ciangin bang gen ding a, bangci kihut ding ka hi hiam, ci-in lunghimawh kei un
Bang hang hiam cih leh a hun a tun' ciangin Kha Siangtho in na gen dingteng uh hong hilh ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua laitakin mihon lak panin mi khat in Jesuh kiangah, “Sia aw, ka pa un a hong sihsan gamh pawlkhat tawh ka u in kei hong inntuanna dingin hong gensak in,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in a mipa kiangah, “No unau' gamh a hawm dingin kua in kei hong seh ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute khempeuh kiangah, “Hoihtakin kidawm un la, na huaiham lohna dingun kikem un. Bang hang hiam cih leh bangzahta-in mi khat a hauh hangin a neihsa tawh a nuntakna taktak kicing zolo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah thugentehna khat gen a, “Mi haupa khat' lo-ah an tampi a piang hi
Tua ciangin amah in a lungsim sungah, ‘Ka an khempeuh ka koihna ding mun kicinglo ahih manin bangcih ding ka hi hiam
Tua ahih manin hih bangin ka gamta ding hi: Ka ansaalte phelin a lianzaw ansaalte ka lam ding a, tuate sungah ka ante leh ka neih khempeuh ka seng ding hi
Tua ciangin keimah in: Mi hampha mahmah ka hi hi. Kum tampi sung ka khom ding annek tuidawn leh na hoih tampi ka nei hi. An ne, zu ne-in, a nuam theithei-in ka om hithiat ding hi,’ ci hi
Ahi zongin Pasian in ama kiangah, ‘Mihaipa aw, tuzan mahmahin na si ding hi. Hih na neihsa teng kua'n zang nawn ding ahi hiam?’ ci hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in a thugen a khupna-in, “Tua mah bangin amau-a' ding bekin a kholcipte pen Pasian' muhna panin mihau hilo uh hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Tua ahih ciangin note kiangah kong genin-ah: I nuntakna dingin bang ne ding a, i pumpi tungah bang silh ding ihi hiam, ci-in lunghimawh kei un
Nuntakna pen an sangin thupizaw a, pumpi pen puan sangin thupizaw hi

Vasate ngaihsun dih un: Amaute in khai tuhlo uh a, anlak cih zong neilo uh hi. Amaute in beemlepang zong neilo napi-in Pasian in annek tasamsak lo hi. Vasate sangin note nakpi takin na manphazaw uh hi
Note na lunghihmawh manun na nuntak hun uh nai khat sung bek a sotto thei kua om na hi uh hiam
Tua bang a themno khat nangawn hih theilo na hih uh leh bang hangin adangte lunghimawh se na hi uh hiam

Gamlaka pakte ngaihsun dih un. Tuate in a nekding uh na semlo uh a, a silhding uh puan zong ganlo uh hi. Ahi zongin note kiangah kong genin-ah: Bangzahin a hauh hangin Solomon nangawn, hih pakte khat zahin a hoihin kizem zolo lai hi
Upna neu mite aw, tuni-in om a, zing ciangin keutumin meikhuk sungah a kikhultum lopa kungte, Pasian in puansilh guan' ahih leh note hong guan'zaw kan ding hilo ahi hiam
Tua ahih manin bang ne ding, bang dawn ding, ci-in lunghimawhin om tawntung kei un
Gentail mi khempeuh in hih nate lunghihmawh penin nei uh hi. Hih nate na kisap lamtak uh zong na Pa un hong thei hi
Tua ahih manin Pasian' Ukna ngaihsutin nei masazaw un. Tua hi leh hih na kisapna dangte uh zong Pasian in hong piathuah ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Tuuhon tawmnote aw, lau-in lunghimawh kei un. Na Pa un ama Ukna sungah ukna thu a nei dingin a hong sehsa ahi hi

Na neihsa uh zuak un la, mizawngte tungah tua sumte na pia un. Note-a' dingin a sia theilo sumkholna na bawl un la, gutate in a luh zawhlohna, leikha in zong a nek zawhlohna, cikmahin a kiam ngei hetlohna ding mun vantungah na sumte uh na khol un
Bang hang hiam cih leh na sum uh a omna munah na lungsim uh om tawntung ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Na kawng uh gakin, na mei uh vakin a kigingsa-in om un la
a topa uh mopawi simna panin hong tungin kongkhak a kiuh ciangin thakhatin kong a hon'pah theihna dingun a topa' ciahding a ngak nasemte bangin om un

A topa hong ciah ciangin a kigingsa-in amah ngakin a om uh a muh nasemte pen mi hampha mahmah ahi uh hi. Note kiangah kong genin-ah, a topa zong hong kithawi-in a nasemte an vak dingin tusak ding a, amahmah in a nasemte an thukin na a sem ding hi
Zankim laitak ahi a, zingsang khuavakkuan lam ahi zongin a hong ciah hun peuhpeuh ciangin amah ngakin a om a muh nasemte pen mi hampha mahmah ahi uh hi
Ahi zongin na phawk ding uh thu khat om hi. Mi khat in gutapa' hong paiding hun theikhol leh a inn luhsaklo ding hi
Tua mah bangin Mihing Tapa zong na upmawhloh uh hun laitakin hong pai ding ahih manin note zong a kigingsa-in om tawntung un,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: A Citak leh A Citaklo Nasem

verses.text: Peter in, “Topa aw, hih thugentehna ko bek nong cihna ahi hiam, ahih kei leh mi khempeuh-a' ding na cihna ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
Topa in, “A pil a citak nasempa i cih a bangcite ahi hiam? A naseppih dangte ukin a hun manmanin amaute' nekzah ding ciat a pia dingin a topa in a seh nasempa ahi hi
A topa hong ciah ciangin hih ama sawl bangin a sem a muh nasempa pen mi hampha mahmah ahi hi
Ke'n kong cihin-ah, a neihsa khempeuh a uk dingin a topa in tua nasempa koih takpi ding hi
Ahi zongin tua nasempa in a lungsim sungah, ‘Ka topa hong ciahkik hak ding hi,’ ci-in ngaihsunin a naseppih numei leh pasalte satgawp hen la, zukham ankhamin ommawk leh
tua nasempa' topa pen ama upmawhloh ni, a theihkholh loh hunin hong tung ding hi. A topa in nakpi takin amah gim pia ding a, a thumanglo mite tawh a kibangin a thuaksak khawm ding hi
A topa' deihna thei napi-in a topa' deih bangin a gamta nuamlo nasempa pen nakpi takin kisat ding hi

Ahi zongin a topa' deihna a theihlohna hangin satthuakna ding a gamtakha nasempa pen kidamsatzaw deuh ding hi. Tampi a kipiaknapa tung pan tampi kikal ding a, a tamzaw a ki-apnapa tung pan a tamzaw kikal ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Leitungah meikuang a khah dingin a hong pai ka hi a, tu mahmahin a meikuang kipan khinta hi leh ka ut hi
Gimna sungah ka kiphumna ding khat om a, tua thu a kikhit matengin ka lungsim a nuam thei kei hi
Leitungah kilemna a omsak dingin a hong pai hong sa na hi uh hiam? Hilo hi. Ke'n kong cihin-ah, kikhenna a omsak dingin a hong pai ka hizaw hi
Tu-a kipanin innkuan sungah mihing nga a phate, a langah thum, a langah nihin kikhenin kido ding uh hi
A pa in a tapa do-in, a tapa in a pa do ding a, a nu in a tanu do-in, a tanu in a nu do ding a, a teeknu in a monu do-in, a monu in a teeknu do ding hi,” a ci hi.
Jesuh in mihonte kiangah zong, “Nitumna lamah meiipi hong kai na muh uh ciangin, ‘Guah hong zu ding hi,’ ci-in thakhatin na genthei pah uh a, tua mah bangin guah hong zu takpi hi
Leitaw lam panin huih hong nun' ciangin, ‘Ni hong sa ding hi,’ na ci uh a, tua mah bangin ni hong sa takpi hi
No a kineihkhem mite aw, vanlelei na et uh ciangin a piangding thu thei na hih uh leh, tuhun thute bang hangin theitheilo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Na Langte uh tawh Kilem Un

verses.text: Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Bang hangin na gamtatna ding uh a manin khen theilo na hi uh hiam

Mi khatpeuh in na tungah thu hong bawlin zumah hong paipih leh, zuma thukhente mai-ah hong kaigawpin, thukhente in palikte kiangah hong apin, palikte in thong sungah a hong koihlohna dingin, na langpa uh tawh na thu uh a sian'theihna dingin na siam tawpun lamkalah hanciam un
Ke'n kong cihin-ah, tua bangin gamta kei le uh cin, na liausum uh na piak khit matengun thong panin na suakta kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
